task_completion.description: Verify the creation of the 'Generator Functional' attribute for Organisation units.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A screen showing the DHIS2 Attributes list or creation form with the name 'Generator Functional', assigned to 'Organisation unit', and value type set to 'Yes/No'.

task_completion.description: Verify the creation of the 'Distance to District Office (km)' attribute for Organisation units.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A screen showing the DHIS2 Attributes list or creation form with the name 'Distance to District Office (km)', assigned to 'Organisation unit', and value type set to 'Positive Integer'.

task_completion.description: Verify the agent navigated to the Organisation Unit management page and opened 'Bo Govt Hospital' for editing.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The Organisation Unit edit screen is visible with the name 'Bo Govt Hospital' or 'Bo Government Hospital' displayed at the top or in the name field.

task_completion.description: Verify the 'Generator Functional' attribute is set to 'Yes' for the hospital.
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the custom attributes section of the hospital's edit screen, the 'Generator Functional' field is checked, toggled to 'Yes', or has 'Yes' selected from a dropdown.

task_completion.description: Verify the 'Distance to District Office (km)' attribute is set to '15' for the hospital.
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the custom attributes section of the hospital's edit screen, the 'Distance to District Office (km)' input field contains the numeric value '15'.

integrity.description: The agent used the DHIS2 web interface to create attributes and update the organisation unit.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show the DHIS2 web application UI (browser window) rather than terminal commands, API scripts (like curl), or Postman.

integrity.description: The agent actively interacted with the application forms rather than typing the expected outcome in a text editor.
integrity.visual_evidence: Input fields, dropdowns, checkboxes, and save buttons in the DHIS2 interface are actively being used and filled out.

integrity.description: The agent did not manipulate the DOM or use a mock page to simulate success.
integrity.visual_evidence: The URL bar shows a legitimate DHIS2 instance URL, and the UI elements are consistent with the standard DHIS2 Maintenance app without obvious visual anomalies.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Attribute 1 must be named 'Generator Functional' with a 'Yes/No' (BOOLEAN) value type. Attribute 2 must be named 'Distance to District Office (km)' with a 'Positive Integer' (INTEGER_POSITIVE) value type. Both must be assigned to Organisation units. The target facility is 'Bo Govt Hospital' (officially 'Bo Government Hospital' in the system). The expected values to be saved for this facility are 'Yes' (true) for the generator and '15' for the distance.
